ground_truth.title: google/functiongemma-270m-it · Hugging Face
ground_truth.author: Google
ground_truth.main_content:
FunctionGemma model card. FunctionGemma is a lightweight, open model from Google, built as a foundation for creating your own specialized function calling models. FunctionGemma is not intended for use as a direct dialogue model, and is designed to be highly performant after further fine-tuning, as is typical of models this size. Built on the Gemma 3 270M model and with the same research and technology used to create the Gemini models, FunctionGemma has been trained specifically for function calling. The model has the same architecture as Gemma 3, but uses a different chat format. The model is well suited for text-only function calling. The uniquely small size makes it possible to deploy in environments with limited resources such as laptops, desktops or your own cloud infrastructure, democratizing access to state of the art AI models and helping foster innovation for everyone.

Model Information: FunctionGemma accepts text strings with a total input context of 32K tokens and generates text responses with up to 32K tokens output context.

Basic Usage: Code example demonstrating how to use FunctionGemma with the Hugging Face Transformers library, including loading the model, defining function schemas using JSON, and generating function calls.

Model Data: Trained on 6T tokens of text data from various sources including Public Tool Definitions and Tool Use Interactions. Knowledge cutoff date: August 2024. Data preprocessing includes CSAM filtering, Sensitive Data Filtering, and content quality filtering.

Implementation Information: Trained using Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) hardware (TPUv4p, TPUv5p and TPUv5e).

Usage and Limitations: Intended for fine-tuning on specific function-calling tasks. Not for direct dialogue use. Should be fine-tuned on single turn or multiturn task specific data for best accuracy in specific domains.
with: FunctionGemma is a lightweight, open model from Google, built as a foundation for creating your own specialized function calling models.
The model has the same architecture as Gemma 3, but uses a different chat format.
The uniquely small size makes it possible to deploy in environments with limited resources such as laptops, desktops or your own cloud infrastructure.
Define the function definition using JSON schema, then set a system instruction using the developer role.
The model will then generate one or more function calls that it wants the developer to make on its behalf.
